escalation.rationale: Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz closure threatens imminent escalation of US-Israeli war on Iran entering day 37.

ticker_items: Trump threatens Iran 'Power Plant Day' if Hormuz stays closed
US F-15 crew rescued from Iran; second aircraft still missing
Pakistan proposes 45-day ceasefire plan for US-Iran war
Ukraine strikes Russian Lukoil refinery, continues oil facility attacks
NATO allies deny US base access for Iran operations

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian strike causes fire at one of Russia's largest refineries as part of continued attacks on energy infrastructure.
Widespread Russian drone attacks killed at least one civilian overnight.

middle_east.description: Iran strikes energy facilities in Kuwait amid escalating regional conflict
Yemen's Houthis claim ballistic missile barrage against Tel Aviv
Israeli airstrikes hit Lebanese capital and southern suburbs in ongoing aggression.
Yemen's Houthis claim barrage of ballistic missiles struck Tel Aviv.

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 Iranian dead, 26 Israeli, 13 US soldiers, 28 Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: Lebanon total deaths in Israeli invasion

middle_east.text: Hopefully, he's looking for an off-ramp
middle_east.speaker: Leo XIV
middle_east.title: Pope

middle_east.text: Hopefully, he's looking for an off-ramp.
middle_east.speaker: Pope Leo XIV
middle_east.title: Pope

middle_east.text: The U.S. will need to 'reexamine' its role in NATO once its military conflict with Iran concludes.
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

observers.description: France blocks US military flights and calls Iran conflict 'illegal' while resisting Trump's demands for NATO support in Strait of Hormuz operations. Macron faces domestic pressure over refugee crisis in Lebanon affecting over one million displaced.

China steps up diplomatic efforts to show global leadership amid Iran war as US appears uninterested in Chinese mediation proposals. Beijing positioning itself as alternative diplomatic broker in regional conflict.

UK hosts 40-nation virtual summit to explore reopening Strait of Hormuz as oil prices surge. Britain convenes international coalition while maintaining some distance from direct US military operations.
Pakistan has offered a two-phased truce deal to end the US-Israeli war on Iran. Iran is reviewing the proposal but refuses to reopen Hormuz as part of a temporary ceasefire.

financial.notes: Global oil prices climbing as Iran effectively shuts down Strait of Hormuz during ongoing US-Israeli military campaign.

update_log.text: Trump threatens Iran with 'Power Plant Day' if Strait of Hormuz not reopened by April 7.
Pakistan proposes 45-day ceasefire plan for US-Iran war with Turkey and Egypt as co-mediators.
US announces rescue of missing F-15 crew member from downed aircraft in Iran.
Ukraine strikes Russian Lukoil Norsi refinery causing major fire at energy facility.
Serbian authorities find explosives cache near gas pipeline carrying Russian gas to Hungary.
Iran rejects Trump's 48-hour Strait of Hormuz ultimatum, condemns threats as incitement to war crimes
Two killed in Haifa rocket barrage as regional strikes continue
Vietnam reports diesel prices doubled due to Strait of Hormuz blockade impact
Trump announces rescue of two US airmen from behind enemy lines in Iran
